headline: Lockheed Martin Faces Artemis Reset And Governance Questions For Future Growth
summary: NASA signaled a major reset of its Artemis moon program, including the potential phase out of Boeing's SLS rocket and a review of Lockheed Martin's Orion spacecraft role. Lockheed Martin faces a possible loss or reshaping of key NASA contracts as the agency shifts toward smaller rockets and different lunar landing systems. headline: Despite Ongoing Iran War, Invesco Aerospace & Defense ETF Keeps Falling
summary: The Invesco Aerospace & Defense ETF (NYSEARCA:PPA) is built on a straightforward premise: wars and geopolitical tension are good for defense contractors. With the U.S. in an active conflict against Iran, that premise seems more relevant than ever. Yet the fund has shed 11.55% in the past month and trades around $160, well below its early ... headline: Firefly Aerospace Puts Rapid Defense Launch Capabilities To The Test
summary: Firefly Aerospace (NasdaqGM:FLY) supported Lockheed Martin and the U.S. Space Force on the VICTUS DIEM mission. The company executed rapid payload processing and launch readiness exercises under compressed timelines. The mission focused on tactically responsive space operations for national defense applications.
